name: testtask
description: Test assignment: build a simple but fully functional "Blog" website **without using any frameworks**.

scripts.build:css: sass --style=compressed public/assets/scss/common.scss public/assets/css/common.min.css && sass --style=compressed public/assets/scss/home.scss public/assets/css/home.min.css && sass --style=compressed public/assets/scss/db-tools.scss public/assets/css/db-tools.min.css && sass --style=compressed public/assets/scss/errors.scss public/assets/css/errors.min.css
